title: wislizenia refracta subsp. californica
intro: Wislizenia refracta subsp. californica, also known as California wislizenia or California brittle prickly pear, is a succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Wislizenia refracta subsp. californica include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
